SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery

Class WaitingListEntry

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.WaitingListEntry
public class WaitingListEntry extends Object
This class models one entrant's waiting-list row in Firestore at events/{eventId}/waitingList/{deviceId}. The document id is the entrant's device id.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    WaitingListEntry.Status
    Lifecycle status of the entrant's application.

    Description

    Creates an entry with the given status and joinTimestamp set to now.

  • Constructor Details

    • WaitingListEntry

      public WaitingListEntry()
      No-arg constructor for Firestore deserialization.

    • WaitingListEntry

      public WaitingListEntry(String deviceId, WaitingListEntry.Status status)
      Creates an entry with the given status and joinTimestamp set to now.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - entrant device id (document id)
      status - application status enum

  • Method Details

    • getDeviceId

      public String getDeviceId()
      Returns the entrant device id for this waiting-list document.
      Returns:
      device id, or null if unset

    • setDeviceId

      public void setDeviceId(String deviceId)
      Sets the entrant device id.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - device id string

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the status string (e.g. Status.PENDING.name()).
      Returns:
      status string, or null

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the status string persisted in Firestore.
      Parameters:
      status - status name string

    • getJoinTimestamp

      public com.google.firebase.Timestamp getJoinTimestamp()
      Returns when the entrant joined the waiting list.
      Returns:
      Firestore timestamp, or null

    • setJoinTimestamp

      public void setJoinTimestamp(com.google.firebase.Timestamp joinTimestamp)
      Sets the join timestamp.
      Parameters:
      joinTimestamp - when the entrant joined

    • getInvitationSentMillis

      public Long getInvitationSentMillis()
      Returns when the invitation was sent (for expiry), if set.
      Returns:
      epoch milliseconds, or null

    • setInvitationSentMillis

      public void setInvitationSentMillis(Long invitationSentMillis)
      Sets when the invitation was sent.
      Parameters:
      invitationSentMillis - epoch ms, or null
